TrGatewayConfigurations.BCConfigurations:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="com.fiorano.bc.trgateway.model.dmi.bcdk.BCDKConfigurationInfo"> 
  <void property="JCAAdapterConfig"> 
   <string><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ESBAdapterConfigurations>
    <ConnectionLess>false</ConnectionLess>
    <isConfigurationRequired>true</isConfigurationRequired>
    <isLicensed>true</isLicensed>
    <Inbound>false</Inbound>
    <AdapterInstanceProperties><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.ESBAdapterInstanceProperties"> 
  <void property="GUID"> 
   <string>DBQueryOnInput</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="appName"> 
   <string>CONNECT_DB</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="appVersion"> 
   <string>1_0</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="domain"> 
   <string>BCConfigPropertySheet</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="instanceName"> 
   <string>DBQueryOnInput1</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="logCategories"> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>DBManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.LogCategory"> 
     <void property="loggerDescription"> 
      <string>DBManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerDisplayName"> 
      <string>DBManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerLevel"> 
      <string>SEVERE</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerName"> 
      <string>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.dbquery.spi.out.DBManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>DBInteraction</string> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.LogCategory"> 
     <void property="loggerDescription"> 
      <string>DBInteraction</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerDisplayName"> 
      <string>DBInteraction</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerLevel"> 
      <string>SEVERE</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerName"> 
      <string>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.dbquery.cci.DBInteraction</string> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>JDBC</string> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.LogCategory"> 
     <void property="loggerDescription"> 
      <string>JDBC</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerDisplayName"> 
      <string>JDBC</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerLevel"> 
      <string>SEVERE</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerName"> 
      <string>com.fiorano.adapter.dbquery.jdbc</string> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></AdapterInstanceProperties>
    <ConfigurationObjects>
        <ConfigurationObject><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.ConfigurationObject"> 
  <void property="beanClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.dbquery.cci.DBQueryOnInputInteractionSpec</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="beanObject"> 
   <void property="SQLConfiguration"> 
    <void property="SQLString"> 
     <string>SELECT  CUSTOMER_ID as agent_id ,business_name,firstname,lastname,mobilenumber,customertype,city,homeaddress,createdate,province,agent_code
      FROM WALLET.CMS_CUSTOMER
WHERE CUSTOMERTYPE = &apos;AGENT&apos;
ORDER BY CREATEDATE DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
</string> 
    </void> 
   </void> 
   <void property="configuredVersion"> 
    <int>1300</int> 
   </void> 
   <void property="errorActionsMap"> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorActionsMap"> 
     <void property="errorActionsMap"> 
      <void method="put"> 
       <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.Error"> 
        <void property="errorID"> 
         <int>2</int> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
       <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorAction"> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>4</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.RetryErrorAction"> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>1</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorAction"> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>3</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
      </void> 
      <void method="put"> 
       <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.Error"> 
        <void property="errorID"> 
         <int>1</int> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
       <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorAction"> 
          <void property="active"> 
           <boolean>true</boolean> 
          </void> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>4</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.RetryErrorAction"> 
          <void property="active"> 
           <boolean>true</boolean> 
          </void> 
          <void property="noOfRetries"> 
           <int>10</int> 
          </void> 
          <void property="repeatInterval"> 
           <long>300000</long> 
          </void> 
          <void property="sendErrorAfterTries"> 
           <int>2</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
      </void> 
      <void method="put"> 
       <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.Error"> 
        <void property="errorID"> 
         <int>0</int> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
       <object class="java.util.ArrayList"/> 
      </void> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
   <void property="guid"> 
    <string>DBQueryOnInput</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="id"> 
    <string>CONNECT_DB__1_0__DBQueryOnInput1</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="outputSchemaDefinition"> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.record.ESBRecordDefinition"> 
     <void property="rootElementName"> 
      <string>Result</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="structure"> 
      <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;?&gt;&#13;
&lt;!-- Created with Liquid Technologies Online Tools 1.0 (https://www.liquid-technologies.com) --&gt;&#13;
&lt;xs:schema attributeFormDefault=&quot;unqualified&quot; elementFormDefault=&quot;qualified&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DBQueryOnInput1/Out&quot; xmlns:xs=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot;&gt;&#13;
  &lt;xs:element name=&quot;Result&quot;&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xs:complexType&gt;&#13;
      &lt;xs:sequence&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xs:element name=&quot;query&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot; /&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xs:element name=&quot;row&quot;&gt;&#13;
          &lt;xs:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xs:sequence&gt;&#13;
              &lt;xs:element name=&quot;ID&quot; type=&quot;xs:unsignedInt&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;SERVICENAME&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;AMOUNTTRAN_100&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;TRANCURRENCY&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;MOBILENUMBER&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;ADRESSE&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;NATIONALITY&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;GENDER&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;PLACEOFBIRTH&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;DESTACCOUNT&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;DESTMOBILENUMBER&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;WALLETCURRENCY&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;TRANSDATETIME&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;RESPCODE&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;USERID&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;FULLNAME&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; name=&quot;DATE_TRANS&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;DESTUSERID&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;DESTADDRESS&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;DESTFIRSTNAME&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;DESTMERCHANTNAME&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;DESTCUSTOMERNAME&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;NATIONALITY_CODE&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;CITY&quot; /&gt;&#13;
            &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xs:attribute name=&quot;resultcount&quot; type=&quot;xs:unsignedByte&quot; use=&quot;required&quot; /&gt;&#13;
          &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xs:element&gt;&#13;
      &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;&#13;
  &lt;/xs:element&gt;&#13;
&lt;/xs:schema&gt;</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="targetNamespace"> 
      <string>http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DBQueryOnInput1/Out</string> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
   <void property="singleBatchMode"> 
    <boolean>false</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void property="targetNamespace"> 
    <string>http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DBQueryOnInput1</string> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="category"> 
   <string>DB</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="configParams"> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>enableScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>false</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsStudio</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="description"> 
   <string>Executes SQL Query sent in the input</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="icon"> 
   <string>dbqueryoninput.png</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="implClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.dbquery.cci.DBQueryOnInputInteractionSpec</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="name"> 
   <string>DBQueryOnInput</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="type"> 
   <string>javax.resource.cci.InteractionSpec</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></ConfigurationObject>
        <ConfigurationObject><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.ConfigurationObject"> 
  <void property="beanClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.dbquery.spi.out.DBManagedConnectionFactory</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="beanObject"> 
   <void property="DBConfiguration"> 
    <void property="DBVendor"> 
     <string>Oracle</string> 
    </void> 
    <void property="databaseUrl"> 
     <string>jdbc:oracle:thin:@192.168.206.12:1522:walletdb</string> 
    </void> 
    <void property="driver"> 
     <string>oracle.jdbc.driver.OracleDriver</string> 
    </void> 
    <void property="password"> 
     <string>94WNjK6AuI34SxPRxpDtNA9SVWVO7bWwjlSv8UCshrg=</string> 
    </void> 
    <void property="pingSQL"> 
     <string>select * from dual</string> 
    </void> 
    <void property="username"> 
     <string>jkwilu</string> 
    </void> 
   </void> 
   <void property="JNDIName"> 
    <string>DBQueryOnInput</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="configuredVersion"> 
    <int>1100</int> 
   </void> 
   <void property="guid"> 
    <string>DBQueryOnInput</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="id"> 
    <string>CONNECT_DB__1_0__DBQueryOnInput1</string> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="category"> 
   <string>DB</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="configParams"> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsReconnection</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>enableScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>false</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsStudio</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="description"> 
   <string>Database Connection</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="icon"> 
   <string>dbconnection.png</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="implClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.dbquery.spi.out.DBManagedConnectionFactory</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="name"> 
   <string>DBConnection</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="type"> 
   <string>javax.resource.spi.ManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></ConfigurationObject>

    <InputRecordDefinition><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.record.ESBRecordDefinition"> 
  <void property="rootElementName"> 
   <string>COMPLEX</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="structure"> 
   <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot;?&gt;&#13;
&lt;xsd:schema xmlns:tns=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DBQueryOnInput1/In&quot; xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; elementFormDefault=&quot;qualified&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DBQueryOnInput1/In&quot;&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;COMPLEX&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;query&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;&#13;
</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="targetNamespace"> 
   <string>http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DBQueryOnInput1/In</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></InputRecordDefinition>
    <OutputRecordDefinition><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.record.ESBRecordDefinition"> 
  <void property="rootElementName"> 
   <string>Result</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="structure"> 
   <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;?&gt;&#13;
&lt;!-- Created with Liquid Technologies Online Tools 1.0 (https://www.liquid-technologies.com) --&gt;&#13;
&lt;xs:schema attributeFormDefault=&quot;unqualified&quot; elementFormDefault=&quot;qualified&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DBQueryOnInput1/Out&quot; xmlns:xs=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot;&gt;&#13;
  &lt;xs:element name=&quot;Result&quot;&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xs:complexType&gt;&#13;
      &lt;xs:sequence&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xs:element name=&quot;query&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot; /&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xs:element name=&quot;row&quot;&gt;&#13;
          &lt;xs:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xs:sequence&gt;&#13;
              &lt;xs:element name=&quot;ID&quot; type=&quot;xs:unsignedInt&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;SERVICENAME&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;AMOUNTTRAN_100&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;TRANCURRENCY&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;MOBILENUMBER&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;ADRESSE&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;NATIONALITY&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;GENDER&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;PLACEOFBIRTH&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;DESTACCOUNT&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;DESTMOBILENUMBER&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;WALLETCURRENCY&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;TRANSDATETIME&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;RESPCODE&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;USERID&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;FULLNAME&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; name=&quot;DATE_TRANS&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;DESTUSERID&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;DESTADDRESS&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;DESTFIRSTNAME&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;DESTMERCHANTNAME&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;DESTCUSTOMERNAME&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;NATIONALITY_CODE&quot; /&gt;&#13;
				&lt;xs:element name=&quot;CITY&quot; /&gt;&#13;
            &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xs:attribute name=&quot;resultcount&quot; type=&quot;xs:unsignedByte&quot; use=&quot;required&quot; /&gt;&#13;
          &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xs:element&gt;&#13;
      &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;&#13;
  &lt;/xs:element&gt;&#13;
&lt;/xs:schema&gt;</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="targetNamespace"> 
   <string>http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DBQueryOnInput1/Out</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></OutputRecordDefinition>
    <FaultRecordDefinition><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.record.ESBRecordDefinition"> 
  <void property="rootElementName"> 
   <string>Error</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="structure"> 
   <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot; ?&gt;
&lt;xsd:schema xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/fault&quot; xmlns:tns=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/fault&quot;&gt;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Error&quot;&gt;
       &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;
          &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;errorCode&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;errorMessage&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;errorDetail&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;data&quot; type=&quot;tns:data&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;
          &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;
       &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;
    &lt;/xsd:element&gt;
    &lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;data&quot;&gt;
	  &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;
         &lt;xsd:any namespace=&quot;##any&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; processContents=&quot;lax&quot;/&gt;
      &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;
    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;
&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="targetNamespace"> 
   <string>http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/fault</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></FaultRecordDefinition>
</ESBAdapterConfigurations>
</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java>
TrGatewayConfigurations.ErrorConfigurations: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> <object
